description: Early 20th-century New York City street gang based in Harlem, founded in the early 1900s by Harry Horowitz. It consisted mostly of pickpockets and burglars, allied with the Eastman Gang. The gang was involved in muggings, robberies, and murder, notably the assassination of gambler Herman Rosenthal in 1912. After the execution of its leaders in 1914, the gang disbanded.
